summary: AI-matched expert network with voice-based onboarding.
editor_note: The sharper idea is that expert networks should know what people can do, not just what titles they held. Ethos uses voice onboarding, public-source enrichment, paid opportunity cards, and 35,000 weekly expert joins to build a deeper matching layer. Unlike LinkedIn search or GLG-style forms, the bet is that interviews create a better skill graph than resumes. The risk is quality control once the network scales faster than its eight-person team.
investors: Andreessen Horowitz, General Catalyst, XTX Markets, Evantic Capital, Common Magic

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Ethos: AI-matched expert network with voice-based onboarding.
Ethos uses voice onboarding, public-source enrichment, paid opportunity cards, and 35,000 weekly expert joins to build a deeper matching layer.
